detail-1.title: About Us
detail-1.description: YONG is a one-stop shop for all vending solutions in India. As one of the oldest and most trusted vending machine suppliers in the country with over 20 years of experience, we take pride in being the preferred choice for India's largest companies and vending machine operators. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our premium quality machines and exceptional service and support.

detail-2.title: Our mission
detail-2.description: Making everyday convenience available- Easier, Smarter, Safer! Staying Consumer Centric, Data led and Values based in everything we do.

detail-3.title: Our vision
detail-3.description: To be the foremost in the Vending Machine industry and allied.

detail-5.title: Our expertise
detail-5.description: With over 10 years of experience, we've built a reputation for delivering reliable vending machines, robust software, and exceptional customer service. From small businesses to large corporations, we've partnered with clients globally to create customized vending solutions that drive success.

detail-6.title: Unique selling point
detail-6.point-2: Advanced IoT-enabled systems and analytics software.
detail-6.point-4: Commitment to sustainability and energy-efficient technology.

detail-7.title: Core Values
detail-7.point-1: Integrity: We conduct our business with honesty and transparency.
detail-7.point-2: Innovation: We continually seek new ways to improve our products and services.
detail-7.point-3: Customer-Centricity: Our customers are at the heart of everything we do.
detail-7.point-4: Sustainability: We are committed to environmentally friendly practices in our operations.

detail-10.title: Commitment to Innovation
detail-10.description: At Yong Enterprises, we are dedicated to integrating cutting-edge technology into our products. Our team stays ahead of industry trends, ensuring that we provide clients with the most advanced vending solutions available.

detail-11.title: Customer Focus
detail-11.description: We believe in building strong relationships with our clients. Our customer-centric approach has led to numerous success stories. Here's what some of our satisfied clients have to say:

feedback-1.feedback: We partnered with Yong for our office vending needs, and the results have been phenomenal. Their customized solutions, paired with IoT integration, have streamlined our operations while providing employees with quick, convenient access to snacks and beverages. Highly recommended!

feedback-2.feedback: We've been using refurbished vending machines from Yong, and they are as good as new! The cost savings have been incredible, and the profit-sharing model with FMCG companies like Amul and Nandini has boosted our revenue significantly

feedback-3.feedback: The corporate bulk vending solutions offered by Yong exceeded our expectations. Their white-label service allowed us to showcase our branding seamlessly while ensuring high-quality service for our clients.

feedback-4.feedback: What sets Yong apart is their dedication to customer satisfaction. Their maintenance plans are comprehensive and reliable, keeping all our machines running smoothly. It's rare to find a company this committed to excellence.

feedback-5.feedback: Starting a vending business was a breeze with Yong. Their guidance, top-notch machines, and transparent rental plans made the process hassle-free. I'm already seeing great returns!

desalination.title: Desalination Project
desalination.description: Converting seawater into purified drinking water using advanced filtration systems.
desalination.introTitle: Building a Better Tomorrow for Water and People
desalination.introDesc:
Our watery plant, Earth, provides a rich reservoir of seawater and groundwater.
However, only around 1% of this water can be used as drinking water.
At this very moment, a variety of changes in the natural environment, including natural disasters such as typhoons and drought, global warming, and geographical factors, are bringing about serious water shortages throughout the world.
If only we could eliminate regional differences in water supply and readily provide reliable and safe water for future generations.
We aim to use water treatment technology that is friendly towards all peoples and the environments, in order to bring about better global standards for tomorrow.

p1.name: SO-FI-RX
p1.desc: Plants producing massive volumes of freshwater from seawater

p3.name: SO-FDI-RX
p3.desc: Plants producing freshwater directly from seawater

p5.name: WO-D
p5.desc: Two systems operated in a single unit

points.title1: Standard-type large plant-type products are listed below
points.desc1: As a specialist water treatment manufacturer, AWT is capable of providing large standard plants for the production of massive volumes of water such as 250.0 - 2,000 m³/day.
points.title2: Our past delivery track record has established our superior reliability
points.desc2: Plants producing 4,000 m³/d or 5,000 m³/d operate in various countries all over the world. Despite being large-type equipment, they are modularized and continuously manufactured in a plant-specialized for RO equipment. Since they are created in module-type structure, they can be installed in a short period of time, and are highly praised for their superior standards.

points.title1: This series has received continued popularity throughout the world for achieving short delivery times
points.desc1: This model provides short delivery times at low cost because its design assumes operation in a wide range of locations throughout the world, meaning it can be used in line with customers' wishes with a minimum level of customization.
points.title2: Outstanding operability and usable by all
points.desc2: Users are not required to possess any special technique, and the units can acquire germ-free drinking water only a minute after turning on the power.
points.desc3: Users can select water according to their own needs by switching to Quality mode when water quality is important, and to Volume mode when a large volume of water is required.

points.title1: Highly flexibility enabled for producing water of the preferred quality
points.desc1: Users can acquire water of the preferred quality within the range of TDS 10.0 ppm to 500.0 ppm of treated water. The highly flexible features of the plant will ensure water of optimum quality for your own purpose.
points.desc2: By using 2-pass RO system which has been created by fully utilizing high-technology, the water produced is of equivalent quality with that produced by the evaporation method. The RO-method has lower costs when considering facilities costs and running costs.

points.title1: Capable of removing Escherichia coli O157 and giardia bacteria
points.desc1: Although the major purpose is to remove the salinity from brackish water and to produce high-quality drinking water, the equipment can also remove 100% of the destructive bacteria that would not get eliminated even when disinfected by chlorine such as cryptosporidium bacteria and giardia bacteria.
points.title2: Removing toxic substances such as fluorine and arsenic
points.desc2: Heavy metal is difficult to remove through conventional procedures. AWT's reverse osmosis desalination systems are strong in removing such heavy metal substances, and are capable of removing toxic heavy metals such as fluorine and arsenic by 90-99%.

points.title1: Operation ensured even during maintenance inspection
points.desc1: When using a single unit, equipment needs to be stopped during maintenance work or when parts are being replaced. By having 2 different systems within a single unit, maintenance inspections can be implemented without having to stop the entire desalination process.
points.desc2: Cryptosporidium bacteria, legionella bacteria, and even viruses can be removed completely. Additionally, heavy metals such as fluorine and arsenic can also be removed completely to produce pure and high-quality drinking water.

points.title1: Desalination unit price per 1 m³: 20 – 30 Yen
points.desc1:
The plant has extremely low running costs, which significantly changes the basic concept of in-taking water from a river. The water is later filtered at the water purification plant. The above unit price is so low that you may wish to consider replacing the equipment at your facility.

Designs for large type plant vary significantly based on the required water amount and the water quality. Please consult us individually.

incinerator.title: Waste Burning Incinerator
incinerator.description: Eco-friendly waste disposal system designed for efficient and hygienic waste management.

about.title: About Incinerator
about.desc: Incinerators are advanced waste disposal systems that burn waste at high temperatures to reduce it to ash. GOMYWASTE incinerators provide an eco-friendly and cost-effective solution for handling both dry and wet waste without fuel, ensuring efficient waste management.

list.f2: Supports both dry and wet waste (70:30 ratio)
list.f7: Can be installed on ground or rooftop

list.s6: Separate doors for loading and ash collection

modularToilet.description: Smart, hygienic and durable sanitation solution for modern infrastructure.

about.title: About Modular Toilets
about.desc: Modular toilets are prefabricated sanitation systems designed for clean, safe, and efficient public hygiene. They are easy to install, low maintenance, and suitable for both urban and rural environments.

list.s1: Unit Size: 1220 mm x 1220 mm x 2025 mm
list.s2: Wall: EPS insulated galvanized steel panels
list.s4: Door: Powder coated steel with accessories

vendingmachine.title: Automatic Snacks & Beverages Vending Machine
vendingmachine.description: Smart, automated vending solution providing snacks and beverages with convenience, hygiene, and efficiency.

about.title: About Us
about.desc: YONG is a one-stop shop for vending solutions in India with over 10 years of experience. We provide high-quality vending machines with excellent service and support. Our vending solutions offer a quick and convenient way for people to grab snacks and beverages on the go, improving productivity and staff satisfaction.

points.p1: Best quality machines in the market
points.p8: Customized vending machines for specific projects

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To be the foremost in the vending machine industry and allied categories.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Making everyday convenience available – Easier, Smarter, Safer! Staying consumer-centric, data-led, and values-based in everything we do.

features.title: Features
features.desc: Our vending machines are equipped with advanced cashless payment systems and smart automation. The plug-and-play payment device supports UPI and other digital payments with secure transactions. The system provides a user-friendly interface, instant refunds on failure, and ensures hygienic, touch-free dispensing. Designed for Indian market needs, it offers reliability, efficiency, and minimal operating costs.

tray.title: Tray Structure
tray.desc: The vending machine is designed with a total of 6 trays for efficient product organization and dispensing.

details.d1: 3 trays for snacks (each tray has 4 spirals, each spiral holds up to 12 snack items)
details.d2: 1 tray for chocolates & biscuits (8 spirals, each spiral holds up to 18 chocolates or 10 biscuits)
details.d3: 2 trays for beverages (7 spirals, each spiral holds up to 7 beverage items)

tray.note: Tray configuration can be customized based on customer requirements.

napkinVending.title: Sanitary Napkin Vending Machine
napkinVending.description: Automated vending solution ensuring easy, hygienic and private access to sanitary napkins for women.

about.title: About Machine
about.desc: Sanitary Napkin Vending Machines provide 24x7 availability of sanitary products without human interaction, reducing embarrassment and improving menstrual hygiene awareness.

list.f1: Fully electronic vending machine with LCD display
list.f2: Spiral coil mechanism for reliable dispensing
list.f3: Electronic coin acceptor with multi-coin support
list.f4: USB data retrieval for sales tracking
list.f7: Automatic stock detection with refund system

list.a3: Reduces absenteeism in schools and offices
list.a5: No need to carry napkins in advance

list.s8: Made with anti-corrosive powder coated steel

menstrualCup.title: Menstrual Cup (M-Cup)
menstrualCup.description: A safe, reusable and eco-friendly menstrual hygiene solution designed for comfort, cost savings and sustainability.

about.title: About Menstrual Cup
about.desc: The Menstrual Cup is a medical-grade silicone product worn internally during menstruation to collect menstrual fluid. It is reusable, flexible and provides a safe alternative to disposable sanitary products.

working.title: How It Works
working.desc: The cup is inserted into the vagina where it collects menstrual fluid. It can be used for 4–12 hours depending on flow. After removal, it is emptied, washed and reused. At the end of the cycle, it is sterilized using boiling water.

list.b1: Reusable for 5 to 8 years reducing long-term cost
list.b3: Can be used up to 12 hours without change
list.b4: Less leakage compared to pads and tampons
list.b6: Lower risk of infection and irritation

list.w4: Eliminates disposal issues of sanitary waste
